1.title: SSL Certificate
1.description: The website does not have a valid SSL certificate, making the connection insecure.
1.remediation: Install and configure an SSL certificate on the server to enable secure HTTPS connection.

2.title: Alt Attributes
2.description: Images on the website are missing alt attributes, hindering accessibility for visually impaired users.
2.remediation: Add descriptive alt attributes to all images to provide context for screen readers.

3.title: Page Load Speed
3.description: The website takes too long to load, impacting user experience and SEO rankings.
3.remediation: Optimize images, reduce server response time, and minify CSS and JavaScript to improve page load speed.

4.title: Mobile Responsiveness
4.description: The website is not fully responsive on mobile devices, causing layout and usability issues.
4.remediation: Implement a responsive design that adapts layout and content for different screen sizes.

5.title: Clickable Elements
5.description: Some interactive elements on the website are not easily clickable, affecting user accessibility.
5.remediation: Increase the size of clickable elements and ensure there is enough spacing between them.

6.title: Browser Compatibility
6.description: The website does not render properly on certain web browsers, leading to a poor user experience.
6.remediation: Test the website on different browsers and fix any compatibility issues by adjusting CSS and JavaScript.

7.title: Form Validation
7.description: Form fields lack proper validation, resulting in errors and user frustration during input.
7.remediation: Implement client-side and server-side form validation to provide real-time feedback to users.

8.title: Privacy Policy
8.description: The website has a clear and updated privacy policy that informs users about data collection and usage.
8.remediation: Regularly review and update the privacy policy to ensure compliance with data protection laws.

9.title: Keyboard Navigation
9.description: Users cannot navigate the website using keyboard only, excluding individuals with mobility disabilities.
9.remediation: Ensure all interactive elements are accessible and operable via keyboard navigation.

10.title: 404 Error Pages
10.description: 404 error pages do not provide useful information or navigation options for lost users.
10.remediation: Create custom 404 error pages with clear messages and links to help users find their way back.

11.title: Cookie Consent
11.description: The website displays a cookie consent banner that complies with privacy regulations.
11.remediation: Ensure the cookie consent banner provides users with options to manage cookie preferences.

12.title: Color Contrast
12.description: Some text elements have insufficient color contrast, making them hard to read for visually impaired users.
12.remediation: Increase color contrast for text elements to meet accessibility standards.

13.title: 404 Error Handling
13.description: The website lacks proper error handling for server-side errors, leaving users confused.
13.remediation: Implement error handling mechanisms to inform users about server-side errors and provide alternative actions.

14.title: Responsive Images
14.description: Images do not scale properly on different devices, leading to distorted or cropped visuals.
14.remediation: Use responsive image techniques, such as srcset and sizes attributes, to ensure images adapt to various screen sizes.

15.title: Form Usability
15.description: Forms are too lengthy or complex, discouraging users from completing them.
15.remediation: Simplify forms, use progressive disclosure, and provide clear instructions to enhance form usability.
